nodes.label: Production efficiency and reduced frustration
nodes.grounding_span: I won't go to build them all like I have in the past and realize the AI messed up and I'm short a dozen resistors

nodes.label: Informed decision-making
nodes.grounding_span: putting the ball in my court for that one was very helpful

nodes.label: Creative control and originality
nodes.grounding_span: AI can't repair broken electronics or handmake these boutique pedal

nodes.grounding_span: now I'm making them with no problems thanks to that one conversation

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors

nodes.label: Cautious skepticism toward AI reliability

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
